name: Oversized Oblong Woven Stripe Decorative Throw Pillow Ivory/Slate Blue - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Let the Oversized Oblong Woven Stripe Decorative Throw Pillow from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee be the perfect finishing touch to your bedding or seating ensemble. This rectangular decorative pillow is decked out in a woven geometric design in blue and white that creates a striking handmade look. It has a coordinating smooth solid hue on the opposite side to add a finished look to the pillow. Designed with a soft cotton fabric exterior and soft filling for added comfort, this textured pillow gives you support as you lean back and relax. Use it on its own as an accent piece, or pair it with other printed/solid square or lumbar pillows for a coordinated look.

Meet Shea McGee, the designer and stylist behind the brand Studio McGee. Founded alongside her husband, Syd, the studio is known for Shea’s design of beautifully elevated spaces that encourage clients to surround themselves with the things and people they love. Now she’s partnering with Threshold to offer Studio McGee’s classic design in a new collection for inspired homes, everywhere.
